restated_intent: Build the G1 Architecture gate: read declarative rules from arch-rules.json and apply them as checks over Python source files. HARD rules (forbidden-import edges) block ship; ADVISORY rules (global mutable state, silent except) score and report without blocking. The rule klass is declared in data, never chosen at runtime — this closes the gate-weakening backdoor.

steps.step: Implement lgwks_gate_arch.py with ArchVerifier that reads docs/frontier/arch-rules.json and returns a composite Verdict.
covers: reads arch-rules.json; a module violating a HARD forbidden-import rule (e.g. data-boundary-no-network) → FAIL naming the edge
an ADVISORY rule violation (e.g. no-module-level-mutable-global) → ADVISORY score + note, never FAIL

steps.step: Implement forbidden-import checker using AST: for each 'from' module, parse its AST and detect imports of any 'must_not_import' package.
covers: reads arch-rules.json; a module violating a HARD forbidden-import rule (e.g. data-boundary-no-network) → FAIL naming the edge

steps.step: Implement no-global-mutable-state scanner using AST: detect module-level Name/Assign bindings that are not UPPER_CASE constants, frozen dataclasses, or Enum/typing declarations.
covers: an ADVISORY rule violation (e.g. no-module-level-mutable-global) → ADVISORY score + note, never FAIL

steps.step: Implement silent-except scanner using AST: detect ExceptHandler bodies containing only Pass or Expr(Constant(...)).
covers: an ADVISORY rule violation (e.g. no-module-level-mutable-global) → ADVISORY score + note, never FAIL

steps.step: Ensure rule klass is read from arch-rules.json; HARD violations return FAIL, ADVISORY violations return ADVISORY verdicts.
covers: each rule's HARD|ADVISORY class is read from arch-rules.json, never decided at runtime

steps.step: Write tests/test_gate_arch.py with conformant fixture, forbidden-import violation fixture, and advisory violation fixture.
covers: reads arch-rules.json; a module violating a HARD forbidden-import rule (e.g. data-boundary-no-network) → FAIL naming the edge
an ADVISORY rule violation (e.g. no-module-level-mutable-global) → ADVISORY score + note, never FAIL

steps.step: Run python3 -m unittest discover tests and confirm all green.

invariants: rule source = docs/frontier/arch-rules.json (ships with this spec; canvas-motion Rust rules added later)
per-rule klass is declared in data, not chosen by the agent (no gate-weakening backdoor)
